description: Collect unread Slack channel activity across a workspace and generate a daily digest with priority buckets and follow-up items.
author: codex
mermaid_fsm:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> NavigateWorkspace
  NavigateWorkspace --> CollectUnreadChannels: workspace_loaded
  CollectUnreadChannels --> ExtractMessages: channels_identified
  ExtractMessages --> SummarizeDigest: messages_collected
  SummarizeDigest --> SaveDigest: digest_ready
  SaveDigest --> CaptureEvidence: saved
  CaptureEvidence --> [*]

steps.description: Open the Slack workspace home and wait for the sidebar and unread badges to render.
Extract unread channels from the sidebar, including channel name, unread indicator, and destination URL.
Read the latest unread messages from each selected channel and normalize them into a digest input list.
Generate a digest grouped into blockers, decisions, questions, and FYI sections with attribution.
Persist the digest to the local outbox for downstream review and replay.
Capture a final evidence snapshot of the unread queue used for the digest.
